en_title: U.S. Helps Vietnam Arrest 7 People Allegedly Involved in One of the Largest and Most Popular Free Streaming Sites for Anime
cn_title: 美国协助越南逮捕HiAnime盗版动漫网站7名涉案人员
subtitle: 月访问超1.5亿次
opus_summary: HiAnime曾是规模最大、最受欢迎的免费动漫流媒体网站之一。越南当局现已逮捕7名涉嫌参与该盗版网站运营的人员，其中4人被控版权侵权和洗钱。

paragraphs.en: HiAnime was one of the largest and most popular free streaming sites for anime until its sudden closure earlier this year. Now, authorities in Vietnam have arrested seven people allegedly involved in the pirate site鈥檚 operation, as reported by Torrent Freak .
paragraphs.cn: 在今年早些时候突然关闭之前，HiAnime曾是规模最大、最受欢迎的免费动漫流媒体网站之一。据Torrent Freak报道，越南当局现已逮捕7名涉嫌参与该盗版网站运营的人员。

paragraphs.en: With a layout reminiscent of legit streaming giants like Netflix and Crunchyroll, HiAnime offered thousands of anime titles to watch for free. The site saw well over 150 million visits each month, making it a top target for anti-piracy groups. These arrests came after years of investigations into the piracy ring by organizations including U.S. Homeland Security Investigations (HSI), Department of Justice, and the Alliance for Creativity and Entertainment (ACE). ACE鈥檚 members include major names like Amazon, Netflix, Walt Disney Studios, Sony Pictures, and Paramount, to name a few.
paragraphs.cn: HiAnime的界面让人想起Netflix和Crunchyroll等合法流媒体巨头，提供数千部动漫作品免费观看。该网站每月访问量远超1.5亿次，因此成为反盗版组织的重点目标。这些逮捕发生在多个组织对该盗版团伙进行多年调查之后，参与调查的机构包括美国国土安全调查局（HSI）、司法部，以及创意与娱乐联盟（ACE）。ACE成员包括Amazon、Netflix、Walt Disney Studios、Sony Pictures和Paramount等大型公司。

paragraphs.en: In March 2026, HiAnime posted a goodbye message in plain text across its domains before going dark. Now, Vietnamese authorities have arrested four alleged ringleaders and charged them with copyright infringement and money laundering in connection with a pirate streaming network that operated over 100 websites, including HiAnime. Three people were arrested on charges of copyright infringement only. According to the Vietnamese Ministry of Public Security's anti-corruption and economic crime unit, the group offered more than 26,000 unlicensed titles across the network of sites, allegedly generating around $12.8 million via advertising revenue.
paragraphs.cn: 2026年3月，HiAnime在旗下域名上以纯文本发布告别信息，随后下线。如今，越南当局逮捕了4名涉嫌主犯，并指控他们与一个运营超过100个网站、包括HiAnime在内的盗版流媒体网络有关，罪名包括版权侵权和洗钱。另有3人仅因版权侵权指控被捕。根据越南公安部反腐败与经济犯罪部门的说法，该团伙在这一网站网络中提供超过26000部未经授权的作品，据称通过广告收入获得约1280万美元(约合人民币8691万元)。

paragraphs.en: HiAnime had been battling against efforts to remove the site and its domains for years. The popular anime piracy site was previously known as Zoro and then Aniwatch, before rebranding itself to HiAnime in 2024. Back in 2023, ACE managed to take over the Zoro.to domain but not before the pirate site had relocated to Aniwatch. It seems the HiAnime rebrand may have also been made to counter moves against the pirate site, as it coincided with India鈥檚 blocking of several pirate sites including Aniwatch (as also reported by Torrent Freak ).
paragraphs.cn: 多年来，HiAnime一直在对抗下架网站及其域名的行动。这个热门动漫盗版网站此前曾名为Zoro，随后改名Aniwatch，最终在2024年更名为HiAnime。早在2023年，ACE曾成功接管Zoro.to域名，但在那之前，该盗版网站已经迁移至Aniwatch。HiAnime这次改名似乎也可能是为了应对针对盗版网站的行动，因为它与印度封锁包括Aniwatch在内多个盗版网站的时间相重合；Torrent Freak也曾报道此事。

paragraphs.en: Just days before HiAnime went offline in March this year, the U.S. Trade Representatives (USTR) released its annual review of Notorious Markets for Counterfeiting and Piracy, which namechecked HiAnime on page 33 . Then in May this year, the USTR classified Vietnam as a Priority Foreign Country over its failure to adequately address online piracy and launched a trade investigation ( USTR press release ).
paragraphs.cn: 就在HiAnime今年3月下线前几天，美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）发布年度《恶名市场假冒和盗版审查》报告，并在第33页点名HiAnime。随后在今年5月，USTR因越南未能充分处理线上盗版问题，将其列为「优先外国」，并启动贸易调查。

paragraphs.en: Although acknowledging the Vietnamese authorities鈥?previous efforts to take down pirate sites operating in the country and to arrest the perpetrators, page 44 of the USTR report implied that the punishments had been too lax. The report made specific reference to the fines and suspended sentences handed out in the Fmovies case: 鈥淰ietnam recently had an uptick in criminal prosecutions against piracy operators in collaboration with U.S. enforcement authorities and stakeholders, which the United States hopes will continue. However, despite having criminal laws that provide for substantial fines and years of incarceration for copyright infringement, the defendants in recent criminal prosecutions received suspended sentences and were only ordered to pay relatively low financial penalties.鈥?,
paragraphs.cn: 尽管USTR报告承认越南当局此前曾努力取缔在该国运营的盗版网站并逮捕涉案人员，但报告第44页暗示处罚过于宽松。报告特别提到Fmovies案件中的罚款和缓刑：「越南近期与美国执法机构和利益相关方合作，对盗版运营者提起刑事诉讼的数量有所增加，美国希望这一趋势能够持续。然而，尽管越南刑法针对版权侵权规定了巨额罚款和多年监禁，近期刑事起诉中的被告仍获得缓刑，且只被要求支付相对较低的经济处罚。」

paragraphs.en: The seven men in the HiAnime case are currently awaiting trial. If found guilty of the money laundering and copyright infringement charges, their punishment might be stricter than in Vietnam鈥檚 previous online piracy cases.
paragraphs.cn: HiAnime案件中的7名男子目前正在等待审判。如果洗钱和版权侵权指控成立，他们面临的处罚可能会比越南此前线上盗版案件更严厉。

paragraphs.en: Photo by Jaap Arriens/NurPhoto via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：Jaap Arriens/NurPhoto via Getty Images。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是一名常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、供稿人和译者。她也为多家出版物撰写过日本文化和电影相关内容。
